name: Push-Up
steps: Place hands on floor shoulder-width apart.
Lower your body until your chest nearly touches the floor.
Push back up to starting position.

name: Squat
significance: Builds leg muscles and core strength
description: Lower body exercise targeting quads and glutes.
steps: Bend your knees and lower your hips as if sitting.
Push through heels to return to standing.

name: Plank
description: Static hold exercise for abs and back.
steps: Place forearms on the floor with elbows under shoulders.
Extend legs back, keeping body straight.

name: Lunges
steps: Stand tall with feet hip-width apart.
Step forward with one leg and lower hips until both knees are bent at 90 degrees.
Push back to starting position and switch legs.

name: Burpees
description: Explosive movement combining squat, push-up, and jump.
steps: Start standing, then drop into a squat with hands on floor.
Kick feet back into push-up position.
Perform a push-up, then jump back to squat.
Explosively jump upward with arms overhead.

name: Mountain Climbers
steps: Quickly switch legs in a running motion.
